non_blocking_issues: 1. [edge-acceptable] addRecentWorkdir still dedupes by exact trimmed string (SettingsManager.kt:157-164) — slash variants can coexist in storage. Visibility dedupes by WorkdirPaths.normalize; disconnect removes all normalized recent variants (C4) AND cache variants (C5). Remaining impact = duplicate MRU slots / duplicate cold-start fetches, NOT a correctness break.

2. [edge-acceptable] directorySessions can retain disconnected workdirs in memory, but buildWorkdirGroups gates display by normalized recentWorkdirs ∪ draftWorkdir, so retained live/session-list rows do not re-anchor the UI. Read-side/in-memory state, not a persistent match-then-clear path; acceptable for this release.
notes: C5 CLOSED. evictWorkdirInGroup now normalize-matches cache rows via the same WorkdirPaths.normalize contract and cascades messages/gaps/session in one transaction (CacheRepository.kt:896-925). C5 tests cover slash variants, exact match, siblings, multi-variant clusters. Combined with C4 removeRecentWorkdir normalized removal, disconnect now hides AND clears cache for plausible slash-variant cases. Found NO remaining blocking workdir persistent-store match site. 4-round blocking arc (R2 C3 disconnect-live-sessions → R3 C4 recent-normalization → R4 C5 cache-normalization) fully resolved.
